dictionary.invalidKey: Invalid key: lowercase letter then a-z, digits, . _ - (max 128 characters).

dictionary.siteLocalesHint: Active languages (table columns and editor locale) come from “Languages”. Built-in defaults are still FR / EN only; other columns are filled via Firestore overrides.
dictionary.subtitle: Admin UI copy per active language. Overrides are stored in Firestore (translations field).

cms.title: CMS — Content management
cms.subtitle: Manage website subsections. Fields are editable per language ({locale}).
cms.subtitleSections: Create namespaces (Home, Contact…) then sections and assign them. Content is editable per country and language ({locale}).
cms.noNamespacesHint: Create a namespace under “Namespaces” first to organize sections.
cms.features.sectionsHint: Add feature blocks. Paste inline SVG for the icon (white fill recommended).
cms.features.errorNeedTitle: Enter a title for this tab.
cms.stat.rowHint: Each line: stat title and value (e.g. +675 or 1200).
cms.stat.errorNeedTitle: Enter a title for this tab.
cms.banner.avatarLinksHint: One URL per row (facepile). Shown in order.
cms.banner.errorNeedTitle: Enter a banner title for this tab.
cms.section.createError: Namespace, key and title are required.
cms.section.selectHint: Pick a section in the left column or create one.
cms.section.noSectionsInNamespace: No sections in this namespace yet.
cms.why.itemsHint: One line per bullet in the lists.
cms.why.itemsHintDynamic: Add or remove a field for each bullet. Saved data is still one line per item for the API.
cms.why.thumbnailHint: Paste a URL or upload a file to Firebase Storage (JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF, max {maxMb} MB). The URL field is filled automatically after upload.
cms.why.errorNeedHeading: Main heading is required for each saved language.
cms.namespace.listSubtitle: Logical spaces (Home, Contact, About…) to group sections.
cms.namespace.empty: No namespaces yet. Create one to group sections.

cms.errorNeedTranslation: Fill at least one translation before saving.
